mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_progress (user_id, total_xp, level, master_xp) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deltaXp}, #{newLevel}, #{deltaMasterXp}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_xp = total_xp + VALUES(total_xp), level = VALUES(level), master_xp = master_xp + VALUES(master_xp)
INSERT INTO daily_xp (user_id, day, xp_sum) VALUES (#{userId}, #{day}, #{delta}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE xp_sum = xp_sum + VALUES(xp_sum)
INSERT INTO xp_log (user_id, action_type, ref_id, xp, earned_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actionType}, #{refId}, #{xp}, #{day})

INSERT INTO user_streak (user_id, current_streak, last_action_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{currentStreak}, #{lastActionDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_streak = VALUES(current_streak), last_action_date = VALUES(last_action_date)
